evidence.q1: Section 8 cross-references 'subject to Section 9' and Section 9 exists.
evidence.q2: Section 2 defines 'Cause' and 'Good Reason' once and they are used consistently.
evidence.q3: Example of specific time language: 'within 45 days after separation' (Section 9).
evidence.q4: Modern commercial language throughout, e.g., 'payable in accordance with Company's regular payroll practices' (Section 4).
evidence.q5: Sentences are grammatically sound, e.g., 'Company will pay Executive an annualized base salary of $250,000, less required withholdings and deductions, payable in accordance with Company's regular payroll practices.'
evidence.q6: Register is uniform: Section 1 uses 'Company will employ'; Section 14 uses 'Company will provide indemnification' – same direct style.
